headline: Eli Lilly’s AI Genetic Medicine Deal And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) has entered a large scale, multi program partnership with AI company Profluent to develop next generation genetic medicines. The collaboration focuses on using AI designed enzymes and recombinases to enable more precise and scalable DNA edits across multiple programs. The deal expands Lilly’s push into digital biology and artificial intelligence in drug development, beyond recent M&A or product specific news. Eli Lilly comes into this agreement with Profluent as an...
